caveat: This framework content pack is a structured starter representation and does not constitute legal advice or complete regulatory coverage. This is a starter content pack for scoping purposes only. It does not constitute legal advice or a complete compliance determination.

obligations.title: Prohibit disallowed AI practices
obligations.description: Ensure no deployment of prohibited AI practices within the organization’s products or operations.
obligations.applicability_notes: Baseline obligation for all EU-in-scope deployments.

obligations.title: Maintain high-risk AI risk management system
obligations.description: Implement risk management process for high-risk AI systems across lifecycle phases.
obligations.applicability_notes: Applies when system classification is high-risk.

obligations.title: Ensure data governance and quality for high-risk AI
obligations.description: Establish data governance, relevance, representativeness, and quality controls for training/validation/test data.
obligations.applicability_notes: Includes bias and error monitoring considerations.

obligations.title: Prepare technical documentation
obligations.description: Maintain technical documentation enabling conformity assessment and supervisory review.
obligations.applicability_notes: Documentation should be current for significant updates.

obligations.title: Implement logging and traceability
obligations.description: Enable event logging and traceability for high-risk system operation.
obligations.applicability_notes: Useful for incident analysis and regulatory response.

obligations.title: Provide human oversight mechanisms
obligations.description: Design and enforce human oversight controls proportionate to system risk.

obligations.title: Meet robustness, accuracy, and cybersecurity targets
obligations.description: Set and monitor robustness, accuracy, and cybersecurity requirements for high-risk systems.
obligations.applicability_notes: Metrics and thresholds should be documented and tested.

obligations.title: Complete conformity assessment and registration
obligations.description: Perform required conformity assessment and system registration before placing on market where applicable.
obligations.applicability_notes: Check routes and deadlines for CE marking/registration obligations.

obligations.title: Operate post-market monitoring and incident reporting
obligations.description: Implement post-market monitoring and serious-incident reporting processes.
obligations.applicability_notes: Incident triage and escalation criteria should be defined.

obligations.title: Provide user-facing transparency notices
obligations.description: Where required, inform individuals that they are interacting with AI or exposed to AI-generated/manipulated content.
obligations.applicability_notes: Applies to applicable transparency use cases under Article 50.

content_versions.obligation_text: Do not place or use prohibited AI practices.
Operate lifecycle risk management for high-risk AI systems.
Implement data governance and quality controls for high-risk AI.
Maintain technical documentation for conformity and oversight.
Implement logging and traceability for system operation.
Meet defined robustness, accuracy, and cybersecurity requirements.
Complete required conformity assessment and registrations.
Run post-market monitoring and incident reporting workflows.
Provide required transparency notices to affected individuals.
